## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Chore (refactor, build, CI, etc.)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style of this project.
- [ ] I have run `npm run typecheck` and `npm run build` locally.
- [ ] I have added/updated tests where appropriate.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (README / typedoc comments) where appropriate.
- [ ] My commit messages follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) spec so semantic-release picks them up correctly.
